chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, MIRPURKHAS C.P. No.S-19 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on MA No.112/2026. 2. For order on office objection. 3. For order on MA No.113/2026. 4. For hearing of main case. 14.01.2026. Mr. Shahnawaz Ali Kunbhar advocate for petitioners along with petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Sharif Solangi, Assistant A.G. Sindh. 1. Urgency granted. 2to4. Petitioner No.1 present states that after embracing Islam she has contracted marriage with petitioner No.2 out of her freewill and wish without any pressure or coercion; however, due to this un-ceremonial marriage the private respondent is causing harassment to the petitioners in collusion with police officials. She also submits that she apprehends that an FIR may not be registered with regard to her alleged abduction against the petitioner No.2. Learned counsel, therefore, seeks protection to the petitioners. Learned A.A.G. Sindh after waiving notice of this petition states that no harassment would be caused to the petitioners and the police official shall act strictly in accordance with law. Accordingly, instant petition is disposed of along with listed applications with direction to the police officials to act strictly in accordance with law and provide protection to the petitioners. Respondents No.2&3 shall ensure that no FIR is lodged against the petitioner No.2 in respect of petitioner No.1 for her alleged abduction as apprehended by the petitioners. Let copy of this order be communicated to SSPs Umerkot and Mirpurkhas for compliance. JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
